title: cylindropuntia mortolensis
intro: Cylindropuntia mortolensis, also known as the Mexican jumping cholla or chain fruit cholla, is a species of cactus in the prickly pear family (Cactaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cylindropuntia mortolensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide relief from pain and fever. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams, with the most common preparation being a tea made from its stems and flowers, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
